{{Infobox territory
| name = Alin's Territory
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A [[Territory]] is a specialized realm or domain that can be accessed via traveling. These locations are associated with specific individuals, such as [[Alin]] or [[Grandmaster Avernus]], and may contain distinct districts like the [[Silver]], [[Blue]], [[Rose]], or White districts. Some [[Territories]] feature massive natural landscapes, including forests with trees of immense proportions. For an [[Incarnation]], a [[Territory]] provides a profound connection to their [[essence]] and grants them significant power; within their own domain, an [[Incarnation]]'s abilities can become superior to those of intruders. While some [[Territories]] are used for traveling, others may be utilized as personal strongholds or cities. There is a suggestion that a single [[Territory]] can only host one [[Incarnation]] at any given time.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] has a [[Territory]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c11">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== City of Light ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">4</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin's Territory]] contains a city with walls of white stone, gold edges, and silver plating.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin's Territory]] features a mural of a rising sun made out of precious stones.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin's Territory]] has tower-tops in various colors including silver, gold, [[ruby]], white, and green.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|A column of light like solid lightning rises from [[Alin's Territory]] into the clouds.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Territories]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
